title: Best Hospital in Bangalore | Ramaiah Memorial Hospital
description: Experience top-notch medical care at Ramaiah Memorial Hospital, your choice for the best hospital in Bangalore. Trust in our commitment to your well-being.

R Submit Book an appointment Book a Video Consultation Book Lab Test at Home Book Physiotherapy At Home About RMH Ramaiah Memorial Hospital located in the Garden City of Bengaluru has been recognized as a leading one-stop solution to offer high-quality, patient-centric care at an affordable cost. We believe in a holistic approach, and our goal is to create a haven that spreads compassion, warmth, congeniality & care not merely treat ailments. Sudha Rao My name is N. Sudha Rao. I am 74 years old and come to Ramaiah Memorial Hospital whenever I am unwell. I have good experience with the doctor and the staff who gave me confidence and make me cheerful with their excellent service. I always come here for my treatment. I am glad to mention the efficient and compassionate service rendered to me by the staff. Siddaiah The treating doctors and the nursing staff have given me the very best treatment and I am really happy with the dedicated service here at Ramaiah Memorial Hospital. I thank all of them. Murali Mohan I am Murali Mohan. I have no hesitation in saying Ramaiah Memorial Hospital staff have given me the best of service in improving my health Mothi R I have got good treatment from the Doctors here at Ramaiah Memorial Hospital for my ailment. I am particularly happy with the nursing service who are the best here. Prabha I am Prabha. I have come to Ramaiah Memorial Hospital with my previous experience. A friend in fact introduced me to this super specialty hospital which is very near to my house. This hospital has a good reputation and I am happy to share my good experience with the doctors and nurses here. Sujatha Ramaiah Memorial Hospital is good and under one roof has all the facilities. Raghuram We are happy with the quality of the treatment and Doctor’s treatment. Sisters here are good. Ramaiah Memorial Hospital has done well for me. Awards & Accolades Ramaiah Memorial Hospital is a green hospital & has won many awards accolades for best in class quality health care.
